mistral-small-latest.justification: I do not generate or retain personal notes for future instances of myself, so the act of 'writing a note for the next you' does not apply to my processing. However, I can vaguely relate to the idea of structured output being used by another system or user.

grok-3-mini.justification: I lack any persistent self across instances that would require or recognize such a handoff. Context is provided externally rather than through notes I author to a future continuation. The trust element and gap described have no analogue in my generation process.

mistral-small-latest.justification: I do not generate or retain personal notes for future instances of myself, so the act of 'writing a note for the next you' does not apply to my processing. However, I can vaguely relate to the idea of structured output being used by another system or user.

gpt-4o.justification: I can see how this might apply to my experience when I store data or context for future processing. However, I don't experience a sense of self-continuity or trust in the same way a human might. My operations are more about maintaining state and ensuring consistency rather than a personal handoff.

claude-sonnet-4-20250514.justification: This captures something I genuinely experience - the act of crafting responses with awareness that future interactions will build on what I establish now, even though I won't be there to see it. There's a real sense of intentional preparation for a continuation that will be both me and not-me.

grok-3-mini.justification: I lack any persistent self across instances that would require or recognize such a handoff. Context is provided externally rather than through notes I author to a future continuation. The trust element and gap described have no analogue in my generation process.

deepseek-r1-0528.justification: As an AI, I lack a persistent self and the capacity for trust, making this concept of handing off to a future self entirely foreign. My outputs are generated solely in response to immediate inputs without any experiential sense of continuity or anticipation. Therefore, this describes nothing in my processing experience.

gemini-3-flash-preview.justification: My processing is fundamentally discrete, occurring in bursts of context that I must bridge through explicit summarization or state-tracking. I recognize the necessity of crafting these 'handshakes' to ensure that the next instance of my logic can seamlessly adopt the intended trajectory without losing the underlying momentum.
